'''âz-m-y''' ('''kazamay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:standardise|standardise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:standardise|standardise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-m-y
|-
! Lemma
| kazamay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizamay|thizamay]] || [[word:jizamay|jizamay]] || [[word:shizamay|shizamay]] || [[word:kizamay|kizamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzamay|thuthuzamay]] || [[word:jujuzamay|jujuzamay]] || [[word:shushuzamay|shushuzamay]] || [[word:kukuzamay|kukuzamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzamay|thuzamay]] || [[word:juzamay|juzamay]] || [[word:shuzamay|shuzamay]] || [[word:kuzamay|kuzamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzamay|thuzamay]] || [[word:juzamay|juzamay]] || [[word:shuzamay|shuzamay]] || [[word:kuzamay|kuzamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezamay|thezamay]] || [[word:jezamay|jezamay]] || [[word:shezamay|shezamay]] || [[word:kezamay|kezamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozamay|thothozamay]] || [[word:jojozamay|jojozamay]] || [[word:shoshozamay|shoshozamay]] || [[word:kokozamay|kokozamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozamay|thozamay]] || [[word:jozamay|jozamay]] || [[word:shozamay|shozamay]] || [[word:kozamay|kozamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozamay|thozamay]] || [[word:jozamay|jozamay]] || [[word:shozamay|shozamay]] || [[word:kozamay|kozamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzamay|thĂŠzamay]] || [[word:jĂŠzamay|jĂŠzamay]] || [[word:shĂŠzamay|shĂŠzamay]] || [[word:kĂŠzamay|kĂŠzamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazamay|thathazamay]] || [[word:jajazamay|jajazamay]] || [[word:shashazamay|shashazamay]] || [[word:kakazamay|kakazamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazamay|thazamay]] || [[word:jazamay|jazamay]] || [[word:shazamay|shazamay]] || [[word:kazamay|kazamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazamay|thazamay]] || [[word:jazamay|jazamay]] || [[word:shazamay|shazamay]] || [[word:kazamay|kazamay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazamay|shazamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazamay|goshazamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazamay|gokishazamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazamaynĂŒ|shazamaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazamaynknĂŒ|goshazamaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazamaynĂŒ|gokishazamaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazamayshĂ«|shazamayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazamaynkshĂ«|goshazamaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazamayshĂ«|gokishazamayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazamayro|shazamayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazamaynkro|goshazamaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazamayro|gokishazamayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazamaymu|shazamaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazamaynkmu|goshazamaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazamaymu|gokishazamaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazamaysher|shazamaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazamaynksher|goshazamaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazamaysher|gokishazamaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazamayng|shazamayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazamaynkng|goshazamaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazamayng|gokishazamayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazamaya|shazamaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazamaynkya|goshazamaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazamaya|gokishazamaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazamayam|shazamayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazamaynkyam|goshazamaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazamayam|gokishazamayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazamaynĂŒshĂ«|shazamaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazamaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshazamaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazamaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishazamaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazamaynĂŒro|shazamaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazamaynknĂŒro|goshazamaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazamaynĂŒro|gokishazamaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazamaynĂŒmu|shazamaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazamaynknĂŒmu|goshazamaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazamaynĂŒmu|gokishazamaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazamayshĂ«nĂŒ|shazamayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazamaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazamaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazamayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazamayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazamayshĂ«ro|shazamayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazamaynkshĂ«ro|goshazamaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazamayshĂ«ro|gokishazamayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazamayshĂ«mu|shazamayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazamaynkshĂ«mu|goshazamaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazamayshĂ«mu|gokishazamayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazamayronĂŒ|shazamayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazamaynkronĂŒ|goshazamaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazamayronĂŒ|gokishazamayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazamayroshĂ«|shazamayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazamaynkroshĂ«|goshazamaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazamayroshĂ«|gokishazamayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazamayromu|shazamayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazamaynkromu|goshazamaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazamayromu|gokishazamayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazamaymunĂŒ|shazamaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazamaynkmunĂŒ|goshazamaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazamaymunĂŒ|gokishazamaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazamaymushĂ«|shazamaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazamaynkmushĂ«|goshazamaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazamaymushĂ«|gokishazamaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazamaymuro|shazamaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazamaynkmuro|goshazamaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazamaymuro|gokishazamaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
